resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A broad East Asian reference-panel similarity summary is available for archaeology-themed context, but no ancient-sample matching model is supplied.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is broad reference-panel context only. It is not an ancient-sample match, cultural identity, direct-descent claim, archaeological-site label, or migration-event assignment.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The Allen Ancient DNA Resource is used only as background for ancient-DNA dataset context and limitations. It is not a personal ancient-sample match.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Ancient DNA datasets can provide research context, but this package does not turn that background into a personal match, culture label, or descent claim.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Ancient sample matching, archaeological-site, ancient-culture, and direct-descent evidence are unavailable in this fixture and are not inferred.
resultRows.sourceLabel: Allen Ancient DNA Resource / MedlinePlus DTC caveats
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Ancient DNA datasets can support research context, but this run cannot prove descent from an ancient person, site, culture, community, or migration event.

ancestryScopeSummary.autosomal: Autosomal ancestry can provide broad reference-panel similarity when a model is supplied; this fixture does not supply calibrated percentages.
ancestryScopeSummary.ancientDnaContext: Ancient-DNA datasets provide research context; they do not automatically prove direct descent, culture membership, or archaeological-site identity for a consumer report.

whatThisDoesNotMean: This is not an exact ethnicity percentage.
This does not identify a precise homeland, tribe, community, nationality, archaeological site, ancient culture, ancient person, migration event, or living relatives.
This is not proof of descent from ancient remains or membership in an ancient population.
This is not a health or disease-risk report.

limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.
